login.title: Sign in
login.visualDescription: Dedicated interfaces for the platform owner, hotel manager, and receptionist.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Quick tracking for what needs your attention

hotel.emptyText: Start by adding the first hotel using the add hotel button.

filters.search: Search by manager, hotel, or email

manager.emptyText: Hotel managers are created from the hotels section when adding or editing a hotel.

trial.autoNotes: Automatic 7-day trial subscription when the account is created.

filters.search: Search by hotel, manager, or email

subscription.emptyNoHotelsText: Add a hotel first from the hotels section, then return to set the subscription.
subscription.emptyFilteredText: Change the search or filters to show subscriptions.

validation.addHotelFirst: Add a hotel before creating a subscription.
validation.dateOrder: End date must be after start date.
validation.addPackageFirst: Add an active package before creating a subscription.

details.automaticDates: The end date is calculated automatically from the start date and selected package days.

subscription.emptyNoPackagesText: Add an active package first from the packages section, then return to set hotel subscriptions.

requests.title: Incoming subscription requests
requests.note: Package change, renewal, or extension requests sent by hotel managers appear here immediately.
requests.emptyText: When a hotel manager requests a package change or renewal, requests will appear here immediately.
requests.pageHint: An independent inbox for reviewing renewal or package-change requests from hotels.

toast.hotelMissing: Could not find the hotel linked to this request
toast.packageMissing: Could not find the requested package

defaultTrial.name: Free trial package
defaultTrial.description: Automatic 7-day trial package for each new hotel so it can start immediately.
defaultTrial.notes: Activated automatically when a new hotel account is registered.

filters.search: Search by package name or description

package.emptyText: Start by adding the first subscription package, then use it in subscriptions.

fields.notifyNewHotel: Alert when a hotel is added
fields.notifyHotelSuspended: Alert when a hotel is suspended

validation.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters

confirm.clearDemoData: This will clear local hotels, packages, and subscriptions. Are you sure?

backup.helper: Export and import apply to the current local version data only.

preview.footerFallback: This is an approximate invoice preview.

defaults.subscriptionWarningMessage: Notice: the hotel subscription will end soon. Please renew to avoid service suspension.
defaults.subscriptionExpiredMessage: The hotel subscription has ended. Please renew to reactivate the service.

settings.pageSubtitle: Central settings for platform identity, subscriptions, invoices, security, support, and backups.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: A smart overview of the platform based on current hotels, packages, and subscriptions.

sections.ownerInboxHint: Requests that need platform owner approval or rejection.
sections.newHotelsHint: Track new registrations and automatic trials.

quick.addSubscriptionNote: Connect a hotel to a package

empty.endingSoonText: Subscriptions close to their end date will appear here based on notification settings.

managerInterface.noHotelTitle: No hotel linked to this account
managerInterface.noHotelText: The platform owner must add a hotel and connect the manager email before using the manager interface.

managerDashboard.title: Hotel manager dashboard
managerDashboard.description: A smart operations dashboard that gives the manager direct access to reservations, guests, rooms, food service, maintenance, finance, and reports.

sections.smartCardsHint: Click any card to jump directly

filters.search: Search by room number or note
filters.title: Room filters
filters.note: Search or filter by status, type, and floor without interfering with room cards.

room.emptyText: Start by adding the first room for this hotel.

form.priceLockHelper: This rate is set by the hotel manager and will be used later in reservations without receptionist changes.

cards.occupiedNote: Has guests or an active booking
cards.noNotes: No notes added to this room

room.archiveHelper: Archived rooms are not deleted; find them from the Status filter by choosing Archived, then restore them from the same card.

page.description: Central floor and room management with operating status, prices, and capacity.

floors.countHelper: The count cannot be lower than the highest floor currently used by rooms.
floors.usedFloorsHelper: These floors come from existing rooms and show the safe minimum limit.

hotelSettings.description: Hotel operation, contact, policy, and billing settings used later by rooms, reservations, and services.

fields.restaurantExternalOrders: Record external guest requests through restaurant
fields.cafeteriaExternalOrders: Record external guest requests through café
fields.autoCleaningAfterCheckout: Move room to cleaning after checkout automatically

roomTypes.helper: Add all room types used by the hotel; they will appear automatically when adding a room.

services.description: Enable the restaurant or café only when it exists in the hotel. The service uses the hotel name, and order sources are configured here: room, table, or external guest request.
services.restaurantHelper: Enable restaurant order recording settings for this hotel.
services.cafeteriaHelper: Enable café order recording settings for this hotel.
services.serviceUsesHotelName: The service name uses the hotel name and does not need a separate name:
services.orderSourcesHelper: Orders can be recorded from a room, a table, or as an external guest request when something is purchased from outside the hotel.

receptionShifts.helper: These shifts are for reception staff, not restaurant or café staff.

foodServices.description: Manage restaurant and café items, instantly delivered orders, printable invoices, and room-account charges in finance.
foodServices.emptyText: Enable restaurant or café from hotel settings first.
foodServices.ordersEmptyText: Start by registering the first order.
foodServices.sourcesMissingText: Enable restaurant or café services from hotel settings. Hospitality and visitor orders can still be created without a room.
foodServices.noActiveGuestsText: Visitor and hospitality orders can be created without a room; room orders must be linked to current room guests.
foodServices.roomAccountHelper: For room orders, select the room guest to fetch the room and reservation automatically. Visitor and hospitality orders remain open and can be paid by cash, electronic payment, or posted to the table account.

validation.guestRequired: Select a room guest or enter a visitor / hospitality name.
validation.tableRequired: Enter the table number for table orders.
validation.roomGuestRequired: Room orders must be linked to a current room guest to fetch room and reservation data.
validation.guestNameRequired: Select a room guest or enter a visitor / hospitality name.
validation.roomAccountGuestRequired: Posting to the room account requires a guest linked to an in-house reservation.
validation.itemsRequired: Select at least one menu item.

menu.title: Items / Menu
menu.name: Item name
menu.descriptionPlaceholder: Ingredients or a short item note
menu.emptyText: Add drinks and food items so orders can be selected instead of typed manually.
menu.emptyForOrderText: Add menu items first before registering orders.
menu.chooseItemsHelper: Choose food and drinks from the menu; the total is calculated automatically.

filters.search: Search by employee, email, or phone

staff.emptyText: Start by adding the first employee and assigning role and permissions.

validation.emailExists: This email is already used by another employee in the same hotel

cards.noNotes: No notes for this staff member

staff.pageDescription: Manage staff members, permissions, and shifts from one place.

filters.search: Search by guest, reservation number, or phone

form.priceLockHelper: The price is taken from the room price set by the hotel manager, and will be used later in invoices without receptionist changes.
form.scannerHint: Document source was set to scanner. Actual scanner service will be connected when scanner support is prepared.
form.documentRequired: Upload the main ID/document image before saving the reservation.

reservation.emptyText: Start by adding the first reservation after preparing rooms.
reservation.noRoomsText: Add a room from Rooms & Floors first to create a reservation.

companions.title: Companions
companions.familyBookRequired: When My family is selected, the kinship proof must be a family book, while each adult companion document remains required.
companions.documentRequired: Upload a personal document for adult companion #
companions.documentsHelper: Complete adult companion documents here instead of inside companion details.
companions.noAdultDocuments: No adult companion documents are required now.

familyProof.title: Family book or kinship proof
familyProof.helper: When My family or a family relationship is selected, upload a family book or kinship proof in addition to each adult companion document.
familyProof.noFile: No family book or kinship proof selected
familyProof.required: Upload a family book or kinship proof for family relationships.

validation.title: Complete reservation information
validation.companionsEmpty: Companions is selected, but no adult or child count was set.
validation.saveFailed: Reservation could not be saved. The document files are likely too large for local storage. This local version stores file names only; try saving again or use smaller files.
validation.roomAlreadyReserved: This room is already reserved. Choose another room.

details.previewUnavailable: No saved preview is available. The file may be too large for local storage.

success.title: Reservation saved
success.text: The reservation has been saved. You can now print the guest reservation copy.

receipt.title: Reservation summary
receipt.popupBlocked: The browser blocked the print window. Allow popups and try again.
receipt.termsText: Please present this document on arrival. Reservation details are handled according to hotel policy, and check-in, check-out, and changes are subject to management rules. The guest confirms the submitted information is correct and agrees to follow hotel policies and instructions during the stay.
receipt.formIntro: This form summarizes the reservation, submitted document types, and approved administrative terms.
receipt.documentsHelper: Only the document type is recorded; document images are not shown or printed for the guest.
receipt.documentsText: The following document types were recorded in the reservation file:

documents.mainHelper: Choose the document type and upload a clear image or scan it.

reservation.pageDescription: A centralized workspace for reservations, statuses, filters, guest details, printing, confirmation, and cancellation from one place.

avatar.label: Profile photo
avatar.title: Optional profile photo
avatar.helper: Upload a clear photo to display professionally in the manager or staff card.
avatar.tooLarge: Could not save the photo. Use an image smaller than 650KB.

guests.pageHint: This section is generated automatically from saved reservations without re-entering guest data.
guests.documentsHelper: Only the document type is shown in the guest profile; no images or copies are printed for the guest.
guests.emptyText: Create a reservation and the booking owner and companions will appear here automatically.

filters.search: Search guest, ID, reservation, or room

checkInOut.pageHint: A daily operations screen for arrivals, in-house guests, departures, and room-linked financial alerts.

cards.departuresNote: Guests to follow up for checkout

checkInOut.emptyText: Change the date or filters to show other bookings.

arrivals.title: No due arrivals
arrivals.text: There are no bookings ready for check-in for the current operation date.

in_house.title: No in-house guests
in_house.text: Active stays will appear here after check-in.

departures.title: No due departures
departures.text: There are no guests to check out for the current operation date.

attention.title: No cases need attention
attention.text: There are no due departures or balances in the current active cases.

log.title: No log yet
log.text: Check-in and checkout history will appear here after operations are completed.

toast.checkedIn: Guest checked in and room updated to occupied.
toast.checkedOut: Guest checked out and the room moved to cleaning. It will not become available until cleaning is confirmed.
toast.checkedOutWithBalance: Checkout is not allowed when a remaining balance exists.
toast.checkoutBlockedBalance: Checkout is blocked because this guest has remaining payments due. Settle the balance first. Remaining:
toast.cannotCheckIn: This case cannot be checked in.
toast.cannotCheckOut: This case cannot be checked out.

housekeeping.pageHint: After checkout, the room automatically moves to cleaning. Once housekeeping finishes arranging and cleaning it, press Mark Clean to make it available again.

cards.cleaningNote: Rooms checked out and needing preparation

housekeeping.cleaningHint: This room is not available for booking until cleaning is confirmed.
housekeeping.emptyText: Change filters or wait for a new checkout to see cleaning rooms here.

toast.markedClean: Room cleaning confirmed and the room is now available for booking.
toast.cannotMarkClean: Only rooms in cleaning can be marked clean.

payments.description: Financial tracking for orders and payments, with clear filtering for orders posted to room accounts.
payments.emptyText: Change the filters or add a new order from Restaurant & Café.
payments.roomChargeOrdersTitle: Restaurant & Café orders by payment and room account

cards.totalOrdersNote: All registered restaurant and café orders
cards.roomAccountNote: Posted amounts to consider before checkout

filters.title: Payment filters
filters.note: Search or choose a payment method without interfering with order cards.

maintenance.pageHint: Manage maintenance tickets and connect them to rooms. When maintenance is resolved, the room moves to cleaning before becoming available again.
maintenance.autoTicketDescription: Automatic maintenance ticket from housekeeping or room status workflow.

cards.criticalNote: Urgent or high and not closed

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Write a clear short description of the issue or required action.

maintenance.activeHint: The linked room must not become available before maintenance and cleaning are completed.
maintenance.resolvedHint: Ticket resolved. If linked to a room, it was moved to cleaning.
maintenance.emptyText: Add a new ticket or change filters to show other tickets.

toast.resolved: Maintenance resolved and linked room moved to cleaning if applicable.

reports.description: Operational and financial reports that help management read hotel performance quickly and accurately.
reports.emptyTitle: No data in the selected period
reports.emptyText: Change the date range or add operational data to view this report.

financial.dueTotalNote: Checkout is blocked when due remains

cards.safeNote: Stable items or no action needed

notifications.pageNote: These notifications are real and generated from reservations, rooms, payments, and maintenance data
notifications.emptyUnreadText: All current alerts have been read or there is nothing requiring follow-up now.
notifications.emptyText: Important hotel events will appear here automatically.
notifications.truePageSubtitle: Real operational alerts for hotel activity. Opening a notification marks it as read and removes it from the bell counter.

subscriptionPlan.description: Track your hotel active package and request an extension, renewal, or package change from one place.
subscriptionPlan.currentHint: These details come from the hotel subscription registered by the platform owner
subscriptionPlan.noPackageText: No active package yet. You can send a request to the platform owner.
subscriptionPlan.requestsHint: Your request is saved so the platform owner can review it later
subscriptionPlan.noRequestsText: You can send an extension, renewal, or package change request from this page.
subscriptionPlan.availablePackagesHint: Choose any package to send a package change request
subscriptionPlan.noPackagesText: Packages will appear here after the platform owner adds and activates them.

toast.requestSent: Request sent to the platform owner
toast.packageRequestAlreadySent: A request for this package was already sent. You cannot send another request for the same package.
toast.renewRequestAlreadySent: A renewal request was already sent. You cannot send another renewal request for the same package.
toast.extendRequestAlreadySent: An extension request was already sent. You cannot send another extension request for the same package.
toast.requestAlreadySent: This request was already sent and cannot be repeated.
toast.renewalLockedWithDays: Renewal or extension cannot be requested now because your account is still active. Requests open 7 days before the subscription ends. You can change the package at any time.
toast.renewalLocked: Renewal or extension cannot be requested now because your account is still active. Requests open only 7 days before the subscription ends. You can change the package at any time.

renewalWarning.title: Renewal is approaching
renewalWarning.text: You can send a renewal request before the subscription ends.

subscriptionPlan.packageManagedByPlatform: An operational package managed by the platform owner.

staffDashboard.title: Staff operations dashboard
staffDashboard.description: A focused workspace that only shows tasks matching the employee role and permissions.

frontDesk.title: Daily front desk center
frontDesk.description: Arrivals, departures, in-house guests, balances, and operational shortcuts in one workspace.
frontDesk.noArrivalsText: Reservations due to check in today will appear here.
frontDesk.noDeparturesText: Reservations due to check out today will appear here.

platformOwner.description: Manage hotels, subscriptions, and packages from one place

register.haveNoAccount: Do not have a hotel account?
register.title: Create a new account
register.description: Create a local hotel account for trial use, then access the hotel management dashboard directly.
register.validationRequired: Please fill in the required fields
register.validationPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.validationDuplicateEmail: An account with this email already exists
register.toastCreated: Account created and signed in successfully

forgot.title: Password recovery
forgot.description: Enter the hotel account email and we will show a recovery message suitable for the local version.
forgot.safeText: In production, a recovery link will be sent by email.
forgot.toastSent: Recovery instructions were prepared for this email in the local version
forgot.toastCheckEmail: If the email exists, recovery instructions will be available

hotels.subtitle: Hotel profiles, subscription status, manager, and operating scale in clear cards instead of tables.

managers.subtitle: Track hotel manager accounts and link each manager to hotel and subscription status.

packages.subtitle: Packages define plans only; subscription requests have a separate inbox for review and decisions.
packages.requestNote: Upgrade and renewal requests appear on the Subscription Requests page, not here.

subscriptions.subtitle: Track every subscription status, remaining duration, payment, and renewal from one center.

print.popupBlocked: Unable to open the print window. Please allow pop-up windows.
